case_title: CONVALESCENT CENTER MISSION STREET VS. DONALD MICHELETTI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. JINKY CENETE--OFFICE MANAGER FROM CONVALESCENT CENTER MISSION STREET--PLAINTIFF, CALLED THE COURT AT 2:40PM AND INFORMED THE CLERK THAT DEFENDANT HAS DECEASED. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,068.80 FILED BY CONVALESCENT CENTER MISSION STREET AS TO DEFENDANT MICHELETTI, DONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONVALESCENT CENTER MISSION STREET

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-19-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JINKY CANETE-OFFC MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID J. YANG. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
